allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading_password psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U trading_user -d trading_journal_dev -c "SELECT id, email, ""isAdmin"" FROM ""User"" LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading_password psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U trading_user -d trading_journal_dev -c "SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = ''User'' AND column_name IN (''emailVerified'', ''emailVerificationToken'', ''passwordResetToken'', ''loginAttempts'', ''lockedUntil'', ''lastLogin'') ORDER BY column_name;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading_password psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U trading_user -d trading_journal_dev -c "UPDATE ""User"" SET ""emailVerified"" = true WHERE ""createdAt"" < NOW();")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=trading_password psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U trading_user -d trading_journal_dev -c "SELECT id, email, ""emailVerified"", ""loginAttempts"" FROM ""User"";")
Bash(git -C tradrdash-web commit -m "Initial commit: TradrDash marketing website")
